title: OFFSET ignored if there is no FROM clause
description:
drh added on 2014-03-21 18:04:05:
The following SQL unexpectedly gives a single row of output:
SELECT 1,2,3 LIMIT 1 OFFSET 25;
This problem was discovered during internal testing and analysis and has
not been observed in the wild.  The problem is believed to have been in
the code for a very long time.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('item2', NULL);
SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0;
key_bug_features: OFFSET ignored without a FROM clause
